lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: Welcome to the Emir's Arena! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: This is the Emir's Arena, recently renovated with his coin. Here, you can fight for glory and prestige in individual duels and tournaments.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did this Arena come from?

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: The original building was excavated by the Varrock Museum a while ago. It dated back to the Second Age!

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: When the archaeologists moved out, a group of warriors, headed by myself, bought the land and converted it to a set of arenas for duels. The best fighters from around the world would come here to fight!

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: More recently, the Emir of Al Kharid acquired the Arena and had it renovated to the state it's in now. He's kept me on to handle day-to-day running, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would the Emir want to do with a bunch of fight pits?

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: Something about a rowdy group of match-fixers, so I heard. I think the guards would know more about it than I would.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get a fight?

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: You can participate in Duels and Tournaments. These may be ranked, if you want rewards and prestige, or unranked if you're just fighting your friends for fun.

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: Win or lose, you'll earn Reward Points for taking part in ranked Duels and Tournaments. You can trade your points here for supplies that might help in the Wilderness, or such places.

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: Now, if you want to choose your opponents, you can have an unranked Duel or Tournament instead, just for the fun of beating them.

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: Use the recruitment boards outside the hospital to set up your own unranked tournament, or to apply to an existing one.

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: For an unranked Duel, look around the Arena for someone you wish to fight, and challenge them...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I challenge you!

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: Ho! Ho! Ho!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of fights are happening today?

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: Every week, we'll rotate the active build, meaning you'll have access to a different set of stats and items. This week, the active build is [Zerker/1 Def Pure/Max/Med].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see your shop?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off.

lines.speaker: Mubariz
lines.text: See you in the Arena!
